title: Missing image_url parameter due to typo
symptom: The Facebook Graph API node throws an error stating that the 'image_url' parameter is required, despite it being set in the workflow.
applies_when: image_url parameter is set in the workflow
not_this_if: The image_url is correctly spelled and formatted
root_cause: The error occurs because the parameter name 'image_url' is misspelled in the query parameters. A typo in the parameter name prevents the API from recognizing it, leading to the required parameter error.
fix_steps: Check the spelling of the 'image_url' parameter in the API node settings
agent_instruction: Ensure the 'image_url' parameter is spelled correctly in the Facebook Graph API node settings.
